title: webapp.service is crash-looping after a config change
description_md:
The `webapp` service won't stay up — systemd keeps restarting it every couple of seconds. It broke right after someone edited its config. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), use systemd's own tooling to see *why* it's failing, fix the root cause, and get it running and staying up.

You're done when `systemctl is-active webapp` reports `active`.
